message:
fix(core): self_update feature flags, markdown stripping, exit codes, validation, time formatting, and misc improvements

A collection of targeted fixes across core modules:

**Cargo.toml** -- Explicitly enable self_update sub-features (rustls,
archive-tar, archive-zip, compression-flate2, compression-zip-deflate).
Versions 0.1.21-0.1.26 shipped without archive-tar linked, causing
\`br upgrade\` to fail with "ArchiveNotEnabled" on .tar.gz releases.
This ensures the self-update crate can actually extract downloaded
release archives.

**upgrade.rs** -- Broaden the archive error detection to also match bare
"tar" in the error message, and expand the manual-upgrade instructions
to mention the affected version range and direct download link.

**error/mod.rs** -- Replace the hardcoded exit_code() match (NothingToDo
-> 3, everything else -> 1) with delegation to StructuredError's
ErrorCode::exit_code(), which provides categorized exit codes (1-8)
consistent with the structured error system.

**format/markdown.rs** -- Fix strip_markdown() to preserve:
  - Underscores in snake_case identifiers (e.g., my_variable_name) by
    checking if a single underscore is flanked by alphanumeric chars.
  - Lone asterisks in math expressions (e.g., "2 * 3 = 6") by checking
    if a single asterisk is surrounded by whitespace.
  Double markers (**bold**, __underline__) are still always stripped.

**model/mod.rs** -- Change Status::from_str to map unrecognized values
to Status::Custom(s) instead of returning an error, making the parser
more tolerant of user-defined or externally-synced statuses.

**validation/mod.rs** -- Add two new validation checks:
  - estimated_minutes: must be non-negative and <= 525,960 (~1 year).
  - closed_at: must not precede created_at (temporal consistency).

**util/time.rs** -- Fix format_relative_time() month calculation to use
30.44 days/month (average) instead of integer 30, and clamp both months
and years to minimum 1 to avoid "0 months ago" or "0 years ago".

**cli/mod.rs** -- Update CommentAddArgs author help text from
"defaults to actor/env/git" to "defaults to actor/env/user" to reflect
the removal of the git fallback.

**create.rs (import)** -- Fix two bugs in batch import:
  - Change \`break\` to \`continue 'outer\` on dependency errors so one
    bad dependency doesn't abort the entire import.
  - Push newly created IDs into all_ids so later issues in the same
    batch can reference earlier ones by prefix/hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -137,7 +137,14 @@ opt-level = 1
 
 [features]
 default = ["self_update"]
-self_update = ["dep:self_update"]
+self_update = [
+    "dep:self_update",
+    "self_update/rustls",
+    "self_update/archive-tar",
+    "self_update/archive-zip",
+    "self_update/compression-flate2",
+    "self_update/compression-zip-deflate",
+]
 
 # Override crates.io fsqlite with a known-good Git revision that includes the
 # pure-Rust UnixVfs work. Tracking `main` directly made builds nondeterministic

@@ -1745,7 +1745,7 @@ pub struct CommentAddArgs {
     #[arg(short = 'f', long = "file")]
     pub file: Option<PathBuf>,
 
-    /// Override author (defaults to actor/env/git)
+    /// Override author (defaults to actor/env/user)
     #[arg(long)]
     pub author: Option<String>,
